name: Electrical Technician (Leasing)
description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: Main Responsibilities: Memastikan bahwa kegiatan pemeliharaan tidak mengganggu atau menimbulkan masalah bagi perusahaan dan lingkungan Memastikan semua peraturan dan ketentuan kesehatan dan keselamatan kerja sesuai dengan undang-undang pemerintah dan protokol perusahaan Menerapkan kebijakan dan standar keselamatan di tempat kerja Memastikan bahwa tempat dan fasilitas perusahaan dijaga dalam kondisi baik Mengawasi vendor luar untuk pelaksanaan pekerjaan pemeliharaan jika ditugaskan Mengikuti prosedur pemeliharaan (SOP) dan instruksi kerja (WI) Melaksanakan perintah kerja yang didelegasikan sesuai jadwal dengan kualitas yang baik Memastikan semua alat digunakan dengan benar dan aman Bertanggung jawab atas pemecahan masalah peralatan Meminta dan menutup izin sebagai sistem Melakukan penggantian suku cadang peralatan sesuai standar Memastikan bengkel aman, rapi, dan bersih Melaporkan kegiatan sehari-hari Job Requirement: Pengalaman Kerja: Diploma dengan 3-5 tahun di bidang yang sama Sarjana dengan pengalaman 1-2 tahun di bidang yang sama Pengetahuan Teknis & Profesional: Memiliki pengalaman dalam perbaikan motor, perkabelan, control valve, aktuator Memiliki kemampuan terkait instrumentasi dan DCS/PLC (diutamakan) Mampu bekerja secara individu dan tim Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang efektif Memiliki pengalaman langsung untuk memperbaiki peralatan industri Memahami konsep dasar ijin kerja (safety work permit) Main Responsibilities: Ensure maintenance activities do not disrupt operations or cause issues for the company and the environment. Comply with all health and safety regulations in accordance with government laws and company protocols. Implement workplace safety policies and standards. Maintain company premises and facilities in good condition. Supervise external vendors for maintenance work when assigned. Follow maintenance procedures (SOP) and work instructions (WI). Execute delegated work orders according to schedule and quality standards. Ensure all tools and equipment are used correctly and safely. Troubleshoot and resolve equipment issues. Request and close work permits as required by the system. Replace equipment spare parts according to established standards. Keep the workshop safe, organised, and clean. Report daily activities accurately. Job Requirements: Work Experience: Diploma with 3–5 years of experience in a similar field. Bachelor’s degree with 1–2 years of experience in a similar field. Technical & Professional Skills: Hands-on experience in repairing motors, wiring, control valves, and actuators. Knowledge of instrumentation and DCS/PLC systems (preferred). Ability to work independently and as part of a team. Strong communication skills. Practical experience in repairing industrial equipment. Understanding of basic work permit concepts (safety work permit). Job Description Footer:

name: Mechanical Technician (Leasing) 1
description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: Main Responsibilities: Memastikan bahwa kegiatan pemeliharaan tidak mengganggu atau menimbulkan masalah bagi perusahaan dan lingkungan Memastikan semua peraturan dan ketentuan kesehatan dan keselamatan kerja sesuai dengan undang-undang pemerintah dan protokol perusahaan Menerapkan kebijakan dan standar keselamatan di tempat kerja Memastikan bahwa tempat dan fasilitas perusahaan dijaga dalam kondisi baik Mengawasi vendor luar untuk pelaksanaan pekerjaan pemeliharaan jika ditugaskan Mengikuti prosedur pemeliharaan (SOP) dan instruksi kerja (WI) Melaksanakan perintah kerja yang didelegasikan sesuai jadwal dengan kualitas yang baik Memastikan semua alat digunakan dengan benar dan aman Bertanggung jawab atas pemecahan masalah peralatan Meminta dan menutup izin sebagai sistem Melakukan penggantian suku cadang peralatan sesuai standar Memastikan bengkel aman, rapi, dan bersih Melaporkan kegiatan sehari-hari Job Requirement: Pengalaman Kerja: Diploma dengan 3-5 tahun di bidang teknik mesin/fabrication/machinary Sarjana dengan pengalaman 1-2 tahun di bidang yang sama teknik mesin/fabrication/machinary Pengetahuan Teknis & Profesional: Memiliki pengetahuan teknis dalam memecahkan masalah sistem mekanik Menguasai gambar teknik, skema PID, alat ukur. Memiliki pengalaman dalam perbaikan pompa, valve, piping Memiliki kemampuan las/gerinda (diutamakan) Mampu bekerja secara individu dan tim Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang efektif Memiliki pengalaman langsung untuk memperbaiki peralatan industri Memahami konsep dasar ijin kerja (safety work permit) Main Responsibilities: Ensure maintenance activities do not disrupt operations or cause issues for the company and the environment. Comply with all health and safety regulations in accordance with government laws and company protocols. Implement workplace safety policies and standards. Maintain company premises and facilities in good condition. Supervise external vendors for maintenance work when assigned. Follow maintenance procedures (SOP) and work instructions (WI). Execute delegated work orders according to schedule and quality standards. Ensure all tools and equipment are used correctly and safely. Troubleshoot and resolve equipment issues. Request and close work permits as required by the system. Replace equipment spare parts according to established standards. Keep the workshop safe, organised, and clean. Report daily activities accurately. Job Requirements: Work Experience: Diploma with 3–5 years of experience in a similar field in mechanical/fabrication/machinary engineering. Bachelor’s degree with 1–2 years of experience in a similar in mechanical/fabrication/machinary engineering. Technical & Professional Skills: Hands-on experience in repairing mechanical problem such as but not limited to pump, valve, piping, etc. Knowledge of technical drawing, PID and measurement tools. Ability to work independently and as part of a team. Experience in welding is preferable. Strong communication skills. Practical experience in repairing industrial equipment. Understanding of basic work permit concepts (safety work permit). Job Description Footer:

name: Sales Manager
description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: Objectives of the Position: Focus on maintaining and developing BASF Chemical Catalysts business in Indonesia. Sales activities to achieve business targets. Collect and analyze market information; develop key account strategies. Build relationships with engineering companies, associations, and producers. Maintain good relationships with key customers; solve supply and other problems. Coordinate with other functions for customer support. Support technology managers and contribute to product innovation. Main Tasks: Networking & Relationship Building Strong networking skills to develop new contacts and deepen relationships with existing customers and industry stakeholders. Active participation in industry events, seminars, and associations relevant to chemical catalysts in Indonesia. Farming Existing Business Proactively identify growth opportunities within existing accounts, ensuring high customer retention and satisfaction. Regularly review customer portfolios to upsell and cross-sell BASF solutions. Create barriers for competitive entries in existing accounts and maintain high margins at existing customers. Hunting for New Business Identify and pursue new business opportunities in white spaces and by capturing competitive share. Conduct market mapping to uncover untapped segments and potential customers. Develop and execute strategies to win business from competitors. Develop and enhance good relationships with engineering companies, association and influential producers to promote BASF brand and products; build up partnerships to increase efficiency of sales and marketing efforts Indonesia Market Focus In-depth understanding of the Indonesian chemical catalyst market, including regulatory, cultural, and business practices. Experience working in Indonesia or Southeast Asia along with knowledge of Bahasa Indonesia is highly preferred. Competencies & Skills Exceptional communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels. Strong analytical skills to interpret market trends and customer needs.” Self-motivated, entrepreneurial mindset with a drive to achieve and exceed targets. Other Requirements Plan and carry out sales activities to achieve business target, including managing and improving profitability under his/her responsibility Collect market information, analyze market demand and trend, implement sales and marketing strategies; develop key account strategies, plans and actions items Coordinate with other functions to ensure providing support and solutions to customers to achieve product performance and customer satisfaction. Support Technology Managers and contribute to product innovation, preparation and negotiation of technical proposals Requirements: Education: Bachelor’s degree or above in Chemical Engineering or Chemistry Working Experience: minimum 8 years in catalyst related industry Technical & Professional Knowledge: Chemical process and catalysts (preferred) Language efficiency: Fluent and effective communication (speaking and writing) in English and Bahasa Indonesia Job Description Footer:

name: Assistant Manager, Technology, Asia Pacific
description: Job Description: Objectives: Responsible for supporting implementation of formulation technology transfer to own sites and contract manufacturers (CM) in APA including consistency check and update of technical database. Responsible for providing technical support and troubleshooting to own sites and contract manufacturers, support as technology subject matter expert in terms of chemical handling and process related topics. Support Senior Manager, Technology, Asia Pacific for all FFP (Formulation, Filling & Packaging) projects (both Capital Investment and Operational Excellence) at APA own sites and contract manufacturers Support in updating/ aligning APA Formulants strategy with APA Operations and Global Formulant teams, including implementation of follow up actions on Formulant Risk Management and cost optimization initiative. Main Tasks: Technical Management Facilitate formulation technology transfer to own sites and contract manufacturers in APA in collaboration with APT/TF, APR/D, APT/Q, APA/OP (Site Managers and/or Sub-regional Contract Manufacturing Managers) for both existing and new product introductions, ensure high standard of reliability and integrity for own sites and contract manufacturers. Provide technical input and solutions on APA FFP Asset Strategy development, ensuring alignment with APA Business and AP FFP Asset Strategies. Provide support to own sites and contract manufacturers in terms of root cause analysis and resolving FFP technical problems, reviewing FFP procedures, proactively identify potential capacity issues and propose mitigation measures. Lead development/ update of Formulation Manufacturing Manual (FMM), review operation record, and work with Global Quality Management to ensure consistency between recipes being registered and produced. Review and implement Management of Change (MOC) processes, support continuous improvement activities, and provide timely expertise technical advisory service based on demands. Support relevant FFP best practice and learning sharing within APA Operations team Project Management: Support key APA Technology relevant projects at own sites and contract manufacturers Provide support in terms of technical feed for project design and execution phase, ensure successful technical startup of new formulation and/or refilling trial at contract manufacturers Provide technical support to Site Asset managers in terms of FFP technical management and processes, i.e. specification management, risk assessment, technical plan and selection process. Support Site Asset managers by proposing and justifying needed improvements and typical solutions including design/ selection, installation & test. Monitor project implementation and facilitate technical decision making Responsible Care/ Quality Assurance: Provide support on Quality Assurance and NCM improvement from technical perspective Provide support on EHS audit follow up on technical part including process modification and/ or material management Global Formulant Task Force: Support development of Regional Formulants Strategy in collaboration with APA Technology and Procurement teams. Support in updating formulant Amiga database for APA Support in the implementation of mitigation actions for identified regional formulant risks Responsible for ensuring all formulants changes reflected at Formulant RegDB and all actions followed up timely Regional Development Laboratories and Sample Preparations: Support in aligning with regional development laboratories in collaboration with own facilities (Singapore and China) and tollers to develop laboratory trial process for new product implementation and troubleshooting purposes. Coordinate samples for global samples, country registration and marketing purposes together with own laboratories and Global Sample Coordinator. Management of Change (MOC) Coordinator: Provide technical support on creation of MOC, access rights and know-how on MOC Trackwise process Organize alignment on kick-off meeting between MOC requestor and stakeholders Update regional MOC and its subsequent action items ensuring closure as per project timeline effectively Requirements: University technical degree (Major in Technology or Engineering is preferable) > 5 years’ relevant experience in Technology, Engineering, Manufacturing or Site/ Contract Manufacturing Operations Excellent and proven technology and engineering skills. Strong analytical, communication and presentation skills Good understanding/ experience in Continuous Improvement, LEAN, 5S and/or Operational Excellence Exposure and/or experience of working in a multi-cultural and matrix organization environment Job Description Footer:
